list.vod_content: In New Zealand's heartland, teams of aspiring female rugby players must shatter glass ceilings both on and off the field to achieve their improbable dream of international glory.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;As Stick Season propels Noah Kahan into global stardom, he faces the pressure of what comes ne
list.vod_content: As Stick Season propels Noah Kahan into global stardom, he faces the pressure of what comes next. Buoyed by his uncanny wit, he returns to his Vermont roots and family and confronts the personal struggles that have left him out of sync with himself.
